CheckTitle: Ensure persistent browser sessions are restricted on unmanaged devices
Description: Verifies that at least one enabled Conditional Access policy disables persistent browser sessions or enforces sign-in frequency, preventing indefinite session persistence on unmanaged or shared devices.
Risk: Persistent browser sessions keep users signed in indefinitely. On shared or unmanaged devices, this allows subsequent users to access organizational resources without re-authenticating.

Remediation.Recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy with session controls that disables persistent browser sessions (set persistentBrowser mode to 'never') or enforces a sign-in frequency for unmanaged device scenarios.
